heading: Orange County Regional Water Reclamation Project
label: 390h–12j Orange County Regional Water Reclamation Project
notes: Amendments2009—, struck out “Phase 1 of the” before “Orange County” in section catchline.Pub. L. 111–11, § 9111(c)(1)Subsec. (a). , struck out “phase 1 of” before “the Orange County”.Pub. L. 111–11, § 9111(c)(2)
amendments: Amendments2009—, struck out “Phase 1 of the” before “Orange County” in section catchline.Pub. L. 111–11, § 9111(c)(1)Subsec. (a). , struck out “phase 1 of” before “the Orange County”.Pub. L. 111–11, § 9111(c)(2)

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary, in cooperation with the appropriate State and local authorities, is authorized to participate in the design, planning, and construction of the Orange County Regional Water Reclamation Project, to reclaim and reuse water within the service area of the Orange County Water District in California.

children.heading: Cost share
children.label: b Cost share
children.text: The Federal share of the cost of a project described in subsection (a) shall not exceed 25 percent of the total cost.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: The Secretary shall not provide funds for the operation or maintenance of a project described in subsection (a).
